/** * Create an optional {@code FilePosition} parsing the supplied * {@code query} string. * *

Examples of valid {@code query} strings: *

    *
  • {@code "line=23"}
    • *
  • {@code "line=23&column=42"}
    • *
* * @param query the query string; may be {@code null} * @since 1.3 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Create an optional {@code FilePosition} by parsing the supplied * {@code query} string. * *

Examples of valid {@code query} strings: *

    *
  • {@code "line=23"}
    • *
  • {@code "line=23&column=42"}
    • *
* * @param query the query string; may be {@code null} * @return an {@link Optional} containing a {@link FilePosition} with * the parsed line and column numbers; potentially empty * @since 1.3 */
